system.flavor: You carve a burning rune of power into the very ground beneath you.
system.effect:
Zone a siege rune on the space underneath you. While you or an ally stands on this space, the max range, line, and arc of all their abilities is increased by 2.
Effect a character is bloodied, they also gain keen at the end of their turn. If they are in crisis, increase range, line, and arc by +4 instead.
